repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern INTERCEPTOR_ANT
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 20 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 20 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform_type RED_BALLISTIC_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_STRAIGHT_LINE_MOVER
      maximum_speed 5000 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform_type BLUE_INTERCEPTOR_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_STRAIGHT_LINE_MOVER
      maximum_speed 1000 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor interceptor_radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      minimum_range 0 nm
      maximum_range 80 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern INTERCEPTOR_ANT
         power 150 kw
         pulse_width 2.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 400 hz
         frequency 10000 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern INTERCEPTOR_ANT
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
end_platform_type

platform red_ballistic_missile RED_BALLISTIC_TYPE
   side red
   route
      position 35.0n 120.0e altitude 0 m msl speed 3000 m/sec
      position 35.5n 121.0e altitude 100000 m msl speed 3000 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform blue_interceptor BLUE_INTERCEPTOR_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 34.0n 119.0e altitude 0 m msl speed 500 m/sec
      position 35.5n 121.0e altitude 20000 m msl speed 500 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor interceptor_radar on
end_sensor

event_pipe
   file output/ballistic_missile_shootdown.aer
end_event_pipe

end_platform
end_time 600 sec
